title: Senior Fleet Manager at Tata Motors Commercial

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Tata Motors Commercial
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Motors Commercial! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Motors Commercial:
Tata Motors Commercial is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Commercial!
